info.title: DepressoSpeech – Unified API Documentation
info.description:
Comprehensive API documentation for the DepressoSpeech Depression Severity Prediction System.

## Services

| Service | Port | Description |
|---------|------|-------------|
| **MindScope Backend** | 8000 | Core application API – authentication, assessments, file management, doctor/admin dashboards |
| **DepressoSpeech ML Model** | 8001 | ML inference API – PHQ-8 prediction from audio using eGeMAPS + MFCC + SBERT features |
| **Frontend (Vite)** | 5173 | React SPA – patient/doctor/admin user interface |
| **Swagger Docs** | 8080 | This documentation page |

## Authentication
- **Backend API**: JWT Bearer tokens via `/api/v1/auth/login`
- **ML Model API**: Optional API key via `X-API-Key` header
- **Admin**: Separate admin login via `/api/v1/auth/admin/login`

## Architecture
The system follows a microservices pattern:
1. Frontend sends requests to Backend (proxied via Vite in dev)
2. Backend orchestrates business logic, stores data in SQLite
3. Backend delegates ML inference to the Model service
4. Model service processes audio and returns PHQ-8 predictions

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: User registration, login, OTP verification, password reset, and Google OAuth

tags.name: Assessments
tags.description: PHQ-8 depression assessments – create, list, and retrieve results

tags.name: Doctor Dashboard
tags.description: Doctor-specific analytics – patient summaries, alerts, and trends

tags.name: Admin Dashboard
tags.description: System administration – user management, metrics, ML health monitoring

tags.name: ML Prediction
tags.description: Depression severity prediction from audio files using the ML model

tags.name: ML Health
tags.description: ML model service health and status checks

tags.name: Multimodal
tags.description: Multimodal depression assessment — upload audio, video, and text features for trimodal fusion prediction

post.description: Register a new patient or doctor account. An OTP is sent to the provided email for verification.

201.description: Account created successfully. OTP sent for email verification.

post.description: Verify user email with the 6-digit OTP sent during registration.
Generate and send a new OTP to the user's email.
Send an OTP to the user's email for password reset. Does not reveal whether the email exists.

200.description: OTP sent if email is registered

post.description: Reset user password after validating the OTP received via email.
Authenticate with email and password. Returns JWT access and refresh tokens.
Authenticate as system administrator.
Authenticate with a Google ID token from Google Sign-In.
Invalidate user session.

get.description: Retrieve the currently authenticated user's profile.
Retrieve the PHQ-8 questionnaire questions and answer options. Response is cacheable for 1 hour.

post.description: Submit a new PHQ-8 assessment with answers and optional audio recordings. If audio is attached, background ML inference is triggered.

get.description: List all assessments for the authenticated patient with pagination.
Retrieve the most recent assessment for the authenticated patient.

200.description: Latest assessment with answers and ML results

get.description: Check the ML processing status of an assessment.
Retrieve extended ML prediction details including confidence intervals, audio quality, and behavioral features.

post.description: Upload an audio recording to be associated with an assessment answer. Returns a `fileId` for use in assessment creation.

get.description: Aggregate statistics: total patients, assessments, high/low risk cases, severity breakdown.
Recent assessments flagged as Severe or Moderately Severe.
Assessment score trends per patient over time.
System-wide dashboard data including total users, doctors, patients, assessments, plus recent user and assessment lists.
Aggregated request metrics over the last 24 hours in 5-minute buckets, plus ML severity distribution.
Check health status of both backend and ML model services.

200.description: Backend and ML model health status

get.description: Simple health check for the backend service.

post.description: Upload a single audio file and receive a PHQ-8 depression severity prediction. Audio is preprocessed (VAD, chunking), features extracted (eGeMAPS + MFCC + text), and the model predicts a score (0-24). Rate limited to 30 requests/minute.

file.description: Audio file (wav, mp3, flac, ogg, m4a, webm)

post.description: Extended prediction returning PHQ-8 score plus confidence intervals (MC Dropout), audio quality metrics, and behavioral features. Rate limited to 20 requests/minute.
Upload multiple audio files (max 20) and receive PHQ-8 predictions for each. Failed files are reported but don't block others. Rate limited to 10 requests/minute.

Submit audio, video, and/or text features for trimodal fusion depression prediction. At least one modality is required. Supports inline JSON features or references to previously uploaded session features.
Upload MFCC, eGeMAPS, and behavioral feature CSV files for a multimodal session.
Upload OpenFace and CNN embedding CSV files for a multimodal session.

get.description: Retrieve prediction results for a multimodal session, including modality contributions.

post.description: Upload a webcam recording (webm/mp4). The backend extracts audio via FFmpeg, extracts video frames, generates audio features (eGeMAPS, MFCC), video features (OpenFace, CNN embeddings), and optionally transcribes speech. Runs the trimodal fusion model and returns predictions with modality contributions. No raw video is stored permanently.

file.description: Recorded video file (webm, mp4, avi, mov, mkv). Max 500 MB.

enable_stt.description: Enable speech-to-text transcription for text modality

post.description: Process multiple participants from the DAIC-WOZ dataset. Loads pre-extracted features (eGeMAPS, MFCC, Transcript) from the raw data directory for each participant and runs multimodal prediction. Each participant folder should contain: {id}_OpenSMILE2.3.0_egemaps.csv, {id}_OpenSMILE2.3.0_mfcc.csv, {id}_Transcript.csv.
Accept pre-extracted features (eGeMAPS, MFCC arrays, transcript text) as JSON and run the prediction pipeline. Useful for processing features extracted outside the system.

get.description: Retrieve the batch processing history for the current user, including single and batch sessions.
Check if the ML service is running and the model is loaded.

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: Optional API key for ML model (set via DEPRESSO_API_KEY env var)

MultimodalRequest.description: Multimodal prediction request. At least one modality block is required.

session_id.description: Existing session ID to add features to

confidence.description: Prediction confidence (0-1). More modalities = higher confidence.

modality_contributions.description: Per-modality contribution to the prediction (sums to 1.0)

VideoProcessingResponse.description: Response from processing a live-recorded video. Extends MultimodalResponse with video processing metadata.

processing_time_s.description: Total video processing time in seconds (FFmpeg + feature extraction)

duration_sec.description: Duration of the input video in seconds

job_id.description: Processing job ID for status tracking

participant_ids.description: List of participant IDs to process

data_root.description: Optional root path to raw data directory
